candidate_summary: A per-attention-head topology classifier inspired by Faroese 3-panel knitted shawl structure: decomposes heads into side/gusset panels, fits a 5-motif vocabulary on 4x4 attention windows, tracks winding-number signatures along decrease-ladder boundaries, detects misalignment-defect propagation, and applies localized LoRA patches on offending head-boundary subspaces.
content_words: faroese fereysk knitted shawl panel diamond cable
trapezoidal back gusset side triangle structural decrease ladder
5-motif diamond lattice cable lace plain knit grid
mis-count winding number drift propagation defect
3-panel cellular decomposition P_side P_gusset attention head clustering
5-motif vocabulary diamond cable lattice lace-hole plain 4x4 window
decrease-ladder winding-number signature W_l cumulative orientation per layer band
misalignment-defect propagation tracker boundary cascade localized LoRA patch

results.name: TOHA Hallucination Topological Divergence Attention Graphs
results.rationale: Uses topological divergence on attention graphs for hallucination detection but lacks Faroese knitted-panel decomposition, 5-motif vocabulary, decrease-ladder winding signature, or localized boundary LoRA patching.

results.name: Hidden Holes Topological Aspects Language Models
results.rationale: Studies topological holes/homology in LM representations generally, without per-head 3-panel cellular decomposition, motif-vocabulary windowing, or winding-number defect propagation.

results.name: Vulnerability Detection Topological Analysis Attention Maps
results.rationale: Topological analysis of attention maps for code vulnerability detection; does not implement panel decomposition, motif vocabulary, winding numbers, or defect-localized LoRA.

results.name: Attention Sinks Topologically Important Roles (Vietoris-Rips on Llama-3)
results.rationale: Applies Vietoris-Rips persistent homology to attention sinks; lacks 3-panel shawl decomposition, motif window vocabulary, decrease-ladder winding signatures, and head-boundary LoRA patches.

results.name: Randomized Multi-Head LoRA (R-LoRA) EMNLP 2025
results.rationale: Multi-head LoRA randomization for diversity; no topological-defect detection, no panel/motif structure, no winding-number signatures driving the patch placement.

results.name: W2T: LoRA Weights Already Know What They Can Do
results.rationale: Analyzes existing LoRA weights' capabilities; unrelated to topological-defect localization via knitted-panel winding numbers or motif vocabulary.

results.name: Attractor Geometry of Transformer Memory
results.rationale: Studies attractor/dynamical geometry of transformer memory; no 3-panel cellular decomposition, motif histogram, winding-number signatures, or defect-cascade LoRA patching.

results.name: Shape of Reasoning Topological CoT
results.rationale: Topological characterization of chain-of-thought reasoning shape; lacks Faroese-shawl-inspired panel decomposition, motif vocabulary, winding-number defect detection, and localized LoRA patches.

decision_rationale: None of the 8 results combine the candidate's distinctive elements (Faroese 3-panel shawl-inspired cellular head decomposition, 5-motif 4x4 attention-window vocabulary, decrease-ladder winding-number signature with defect-cascade tracking, and per-defect localized boundary LoRA patching). All scores fall below kw>=2, sem>=0.7, and func>=0.7 thresholds, so total_hits=0 and the candidate passes. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.78-0.90 / func 0.78-0.90 on TDA-attention + topology + LoRA per-head adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E aggregate-adjacency vs per-paper scoring).
